diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,158 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: TypeScript with Hono imports and type definitions for CreateHandlersInterface
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory pattern helper for creating Hono apps and handlers with generic type support
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: TypeScript using Context and URL utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/url.ts
+- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for getting matched routes and path information from context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, WSContext, WSMessageReceive, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: TypeScript with Context and MiddlewareHandler types
+- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade and event handling utilities for Hono's WS support
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie
+- Reads as: TypeScript using utils/cookie module
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie.ts, src/context.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie management helpers for reading, writing, and deleting signed and regular cookies
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing from client and types
+- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/context.ts, src/hono.ts
+- Safe summary: Test client utility for calling Hono app methods in tests
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: TypeScript requiring raw helper and DOM utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/jsx/dom/css.ts, src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS style utilities for server-side and client-side rendering with runtime support
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: TypeScript with unique symbols for CSS class name handling
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities providing class name generation and style string building functions
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing HTTPException and headers
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper for forwarding requests to external servers with header handling
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: TypeScript using Hono, RouterRoute, and color utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying registered routes in formatted output
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing html utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: Simple HTML escaping helper for template string rendering in strings with callbacks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: TypeScript exporting re-exports from submodules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static site generation helper for pre-rendering Hono apps to static HTML files
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing client, types, and utils for file system and response handling
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/utils/concurrent.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for generating static pages with concurrency control and plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGContext
+- Reads as: TypeScript using context and utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware utilities for SSG context detection, dynamic route params, and SSG-specific routing
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths, dirname
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing Hono, types, and handler utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared utility functions for SSG including path joining, directory name extraction, and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: TypeScript exporting re-exports from stream, sse, and text modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming response helpers for text, SSE, and chunked data delivery
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing Context and utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming response helper using TransformStream for chunked responses
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: TypeScript extending StreamingApi with SSE-specific writeSSE method
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming helper with proper headers and message formatting
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: TypeScript importing context and stream helpers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Plain text streaming helper setting appropriate content-type and encoding headers
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: TypeScript re-
